hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair in Dallas, TX
hero.subheadline: Reliable, honest, and affordable auto maintenance and repair for your vehicle. We treat your car like our own.

featureSections.title: Quality Repairs You Can Count On
featureSections.body: We use only high-quality parts and advanced diagnostic tools to ensure your car runs smoothly and safely. Every repair comes with our satisfaction guarantee.
featureSections.cardBody: We explain every issue and get your approval before any work begins. No surprises, just honest service.

featureSections.title: Hassle-Free Auto Maintenance
featureSections.body: From oil changes to brake repairs, we handle it all with efficiency and care. We work with your schedule to minimize downtime.
featureSections.cardBody: Book online or call us. We'll get you in and out fast so you can get back on the road.

whyChooseUs.title: Experienced Technicians

whyChooseUs.title: Honest Pricing

whyChooseUs.title: Customer-First Approach

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Parts & Equipment

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Back on the Road?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online for reliable auto repair in Dallas.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to complex repairs, Contreras Auto Repair offers comprehensive auto services in Dallas, TX. Our certified technicians use top-tier equipment to keep your vehicle running at its best.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert engine diagnostics and repair for all makes and models.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic tools pinpoint engine issues quickly and accurately. Whether it's a check engine light, rough idling, or loss of power, we'll get to the root of the problem and fix it right.
benefits: Accurate diagnostics save time and money
Repairs that restore performance and fuel efficiency

process.title: Comprehensive Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to read error codes and analyze performance data.

process.title: Detailed Explanation
process.description: We explain the issue and provide a clear estimate before any work begins.

process.title: Precision Repair
process.description: Our technicians perform the repair using OEM or high-quality parts, then test to ensure everything is perfect.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics take about 1-2 hours, depending on the complexity of the issue.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on engine repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand by our work with a warranty on parts and labor.

services.title: Brake Service & Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your brakes in top condition for safety and performance.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most important safety feature. We inspect, repair, and replace brake pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid to ensure reliable stopping power.

process.title: Thorough Inspection
process.description: We check pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid levels.

process.title: Honest Recommendation
process.description: We advise on necessary repairs and optional upgrades based on your driving habits.

process.title: Precision Installation
process.description: We install quality components and perform a road test to confirm performance.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-70,000 miles, but it depends on driving style and conditions.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake problems?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, vibration, or a soft brake pedal indicate it's time for an inspection.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Regular oil changes and fluid checks to keep your engine healthy.
services.longDescription: Routine oil changes are vital for engine longevity. We use high-quality oil and filters, and also check and top off all other fluids to keep your car running smoothly.
benefits: Improved engine performance and fuel economy
Complimentary multi-point inspection with every oil change

process.title: Drain Old Oil
process.description: We safely drain and recycle old oil and remove the used filter.

process.title: Add Fresh Oil & Filter
process.description: We install a new filter and add the recommended oil type and amount.

process.title: Fluid Check & Inspection
process.description: We check all fluids, belts, hoses, and tire pressure, and provide a report.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 5,000 to 7,500 miles for most modern vehicles, but check your owner's manual.

faqs.question: What oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic oils from top brands to meet your vehicle's needs.

services.title: A/C & Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable year-round with expert A/C and heating service.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning A/C or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair all climate control systems, from refrigerant leaks to blower motor issues.
benefits: Improved air quality and defrosting performance

process.title: System Diagnosis
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor, condenser, and electrical components.

process.title: Leak Detection & Repair
process.description: We find and fix leaks using UV dye and professional tools.

process.title: Recharge & Test
process.description: We recharge the system to manufacturer specs and verify proper cooling/heating.

faqs.question: Why is my A/C blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a bad compressor, or an electrical issue. We can diagnose it.

faqs.question: How long does an A/C repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs take 2-4 hours, but complex issues may require longer.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Auto Repair Shop
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our community safe on the road, with transparency and integrity at every step.
story: Contreras Auto Repair LLC was founded in 2010 with a vision to offer Dallas drivers a better auto repair experience. Owner Juan Contreras, a master technician with over 15 years of experience, wanted to build a shop where customers felt respected and informed. Starting with a small two-bay garage, the business grew through word-of-mouth thanks to its commitment to quality and fairness.

Today, we serve thousands of satisfied customers from Lakewood to White Rock and beyond. Our team continues the tradition of honest diagnostics, fair pricing, and expert repairs. We treat every vehicle as if it were our own, because your safety and satisfaction are what drive us.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you the truth about your vehicle's needs and never recommend unnecessary repairs.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use the best parts and tools to ensure repairs last and perform reliably.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We are proud to be a locally owned business that supports our Dallas neighbors.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: Clear estimates, open communication, and no hidden fees—always.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service? Call us or fill out the form below.
